title: Bookmark navigation in PDF fullscreen viewer (dbg103)
description:
Bookmark Go in the continuous PDF viewer required two clicks, landed on a blurry page, and Ctrl+wheel zoom snapped back to fit-width instead of continuing from the bookmark position.

dbg103 adds a continuous-viewer scroll path (stack coords + wait for page slot), force re-raster of visible pages after bookmark focus, suppresses fit/reflow while navigating, and preserves user zoom across wheel zoom after a bookmark.

Who is affected: OVH private server PDF Viewer fullscreen workspace.
changeLog: Single-click bookmark Go waits for continuous viewer page slot then scrolls via stack layout.
Force sharp re-render of visible PDF tiles after bookmark navigation.
Skip fit/reflow remount on continuous viewer during bookmark focus window.
Preserve user zoom level; no auto-fit reset after Ctrl+wheel from bookmark.
